lyrics.verse1:
She put her hand in mine
Drew me a valentine
I grabbed the check and fell in love

Some time down the line
Something was feeling right
So I lit the fuse and blew it up
lyrics.pre_chorus:
You are where I want to be
Tell me do you want to try
To close the door to might have beens
and rest your head with mine
lyrics.chorus:
I want to go home
Let me go back, let me go back home again
I want to come home
Can we go back, can we go back home again
I want to come home
lyrics.verse2:
7 years passed us by
I can't believe my eyes
You look the same as when we met

Yeah you were simple then
Dating another man
And I'm the reason that you left
lyrics.pre_chorus2:
So where do we go from here
Tell me can you read my mind
Are you thinking that the only view
That you want to see for your life is
when you come home
lyrics.bridge:
For crying out loud
For crying out loud again
For crying out loud
For crying out loud again
I just want to come home Yeah
lyrics.outro:
She put her hand in mine
Drew me a valentine
I grabbed the check and fell in love
I want to come home

Yeah you were simple then
Dating another man
And I'm the reason that you left
I want to go home

lyrics.verse1:
I've got a question for you, girl
Do you think that you might agree
To take a chance and fall in love
With a sentimental fool like me

Do you think that it's okay
Do you think that I'm enough
Do you think that maybe we
Maybe we could be the ones
Who are running through the rain
Like in the movie scene
I know they're 31, but they're playing 17
Or do you think maybe we
lyrics.chorus:
We get the beautiful life
(Whoa-Whoa-Oh) (Whoa-Whoa-Oh) (Whoa-Whoa-Oh)
We want the beautiful life
(Whoa-Whoa-Oh) (Whoa-Whoa-Oh) (Whoa-Whoa-Oh)
We want the beautiful life
lyrics.verse2:
Now I've got nothing left to lose
I put the matches right to the fuse
I hit you up from time to time
Just to see if you had changed your mind

Do you like it when I call, yeah
Does it make you smile
Do I ever cross your mind
Do you think of me sometimes
Or do you think maybe we

lyrics.verse1:
She had high heels and a bad reputation
She had the devil in the wink of her eye
When it comes to love there's no reservation
She's been breaking hearts for most of her life
Well there's no doubt about it I'm in heaven
every time that she smiles
lyrics.chorus:
She's got a party going on, Dancing in the lawn
All the windows up and the radio on
She's hotter than the 4th of July
She's got cut off jeans, Hair done right
Brighter than the stars on a Saturday night
She's all good
It's alright, She's a Midwest girl in the summertime
(Whoa-Oh-Oh)
Midwest girl in the summertime
(Whoa-Oh-Oh)
lyrics.verse2:
She went dancing by the stars in the moonlight
Then she left before she said her goodbyes
Queen of the suburbs and the Naperville nightlife
She's looking to show off for her ex's tonight
Now I said "No don't wake me"
I'll stay sleeping for the rest of my life
lyrics.bridge:
When we kiss I need more than this
The sweetness of her lips I need a candy fix
Oh girl, I hear the sugar when you call my name
Shut up and let the radio play

lyrics.verse1:
Hello, good to see you again
My God it's been so long
Could it be you don't need me anymore
I wonder what went wrong

I'm counting down by one Mississippi
Distance from your world to the city
I drew your name in the stars tonight
To find out where you are
lyrics.chorus:
Always, I wonder what we could have been
No way, I'll ever learn to live again
We set fire to the world and it tore us apart
What we are; who we were made a fool of your heart
Yeah, let's try again and go back to the start
For now, 'til then, for always
lyrics.verse2:
Oh, Think I lost you again
I scared you with my words
You don't need or want to anymore
You'd rather hide than hurt

And so you just sit there fine looking pretty
Helpless, scared and making a killing
Selling what you have in life to make me smile again
lyrics.bridge:
(Whoa-Oh)
I think you knew right away (Whoa-Oh)
But you let it go for me to save (Whoa-Oh)
Take your time to figure out
What you need and what you want
and I will be there waiting
lyrics.outro:
For now, I want for you to need me
And just say that you believe me
Now, 'til then, for always

lyrics.intro:
Whoa-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oo-Oh
Whoa-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oo-Oh Oh-Oh,
if you change your mind
(Hey, hey, hey)
lyrics.verse1:
90 miles an hour sitting shotgun singing
Feeling so alive by the city tonight
Whoa-Oh-Oh, It was you and I

Girl I know you're sweet and I like my candy
I love taste of sugar but your heart seems heavy
Whoa-Oh-Oh, What's on your mind
lyrics.pre_chorus:
With the sun in our eyes Feeling so alive
All the windows up, A 7-hour drive
Calling out for air, Taking our lives
I heard you say, "Baby, baby just go!"
lyrics.chorus:
(Whoa-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oo-Oh)
I thought I'd let you know (Whoa-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oo-Oh)
That I'll be here, if you change your mind
Baby tonight (Whoa-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oo-Oh)
And after all this time (Whoa-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oh-Oo-Oh)
I'll be here if you change your mind
lyrics.verse2:
She's in Oklahoma with some church bells ringing
Found herself another who don't mind her singing
Whoa-Oh-Oh, You say "It's fine"

You're starring down the barrel of a shotgun wedding
It's hard to make it better when it's just pretending
Whoa-Oh-Oh, You draw the line
lyrics.bridge:
So think of me sometime when you're alone
sitting shotgun singing
Thinking we were better than the life you're living
It's not too late to runaway
So wait for me and baby, baby let's go

lyrics.verse1:
You're willing, I'm ready
Your hands are unsteady
My life for this hour
Oh yeah

Your lips say you want it
They're red and they're taunting
Don't stop me from caving
lyrics.pre_chorus:
If I tell you to leave
Say you're alright
Down on my knees
I think that there's another way to save me
Just call me baby
lyrics.verse2:
You pull me, Come closer
Don't tell me it's over
My heart is so ready
Oh yeah

Your hand inside mine
Your hair is entwined
I'm trying to shake this
lyrics.bridge:
I fall slowly Watching, waiting
Patience waning I think I'm in love (yeah)
I think we say it
But never state it
Yeah, I can't take it
I think we're in love

lyrics.verse1:
Hey
You took my heart and you broke it i swear,
broke it I swear you did
It took a while but now we're getting somewhere,
getting somewhere with this
lyrics.chorus:
Dear, have you lost your mind
And what gives you the right
To forget about me
Forget about me
lyrics.verse2:
It took the devil just to do what you did,
do what you did to me
Another level of the hell that you give,
hell that you gave to me

I dare you to cross the line
And in your own sweet time
You'll forget about me
Forget about me
lyrics.outro:
I heard you're doing fine
I guess you crossed my mind
Oh yeah
You'll forget about me
Forget about me

lyrics.verse1:
Oh
No, you won't ever be enough
To occupy all his love, For you
You
Oh you were better off as friends
His love is only just pretend
For you
lyrics.pre_chorus:
And these words will break your silence
As you turn just to walk away
From what we both know is just the start of this
lyrics.chorus:
Tell me with your eyes wide open
Does he love you madly
Tell me does his heart beat slowly
From the very thought of you
Does he want you badly
Does it kill you quickly
Tell me with your eyes wide open
Does it break the very heart of you tonight
lyrics.verse2:
You
You thought that you could change his mind
Like maybe he would fall in line
For you
No
No don't ever apologize
We know that it's just in time For you
lyrics.pre_chorus2:
No promises just words in vain
Here goes that one thought you hate
Maybe someone else will give him what he needs

lyrics.verse1:
I can't sleep on this tonight
And I can't bring you back to life
I wish I could but it's the truth
Cancer took the best of you
But you gave one hell of a fight
lyrics.verse2:
I'm nobody's fool
I know there's nothing I can do
I see that you're already gone
And I'll learn to get along
Living without you
lyrics.verse3:
They gave you morphine to dream
I watched them take you from me
In a cold hospice room
I saw the last breath you drew
lyrics.verse4:
I've been a poet and a thief
I've been a liar and a cheat
I hurt the ones I dare to love
I chalk it up to just bad luck
But you saw the best in me
lyrics.outro:
So it is and so it goes
Maybe further down the road
I'll see a fire and a spark
You'll be the light inside the dark
But I just can't let this go
These words I hate to write
But I miss my dad tonight
